title: remove dependency on openshift struct
body:
use of github.com/openshift/api/config/v1 is costly in size, something around 10MB.  removal of this dependancy and using a locally defined struct took the buildah executable size from around 38MB to around 27MB.  This also hits libpod and allows it also shed that size as well.

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Changes LGTM, tests aren't happy at the moment, but I don't think it's related.  Looks like Friday afternoon CI going on vacation.

My only small concern is these definitions diverging at some point, but I think there's an extremely low chance of that happening.
@rhatdan if possible, I'd like to get my imagebuilder fix in too.
